title: Lakhesvara Siva temple
tagline: Lakhesvara Siva temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Lakhesvara Siva temple (13th century AD.) Location: Lat 20° 14’ 33"N, Long 85° 50’ 17" E, Elev 60 ft.
overview.description: Lakhesvara Siva temple (13th century AD.) Location: Lat 20° 14’ 33"N, Long 85° 50’ 17" E, Elev 60 ft. Approach- Lakhesvara Siva temple is located in the right side of the Ganges–Yamuna road, behind the Lingaraja market complex, Old town, Bhubaneswar, Orissa, India. It is situated at a distance of 70 metres north east of Lingaraj temple and at a distance of 10 metres south of Gangesvara and Yamunesvara Siva temple across the road. The temple is facing towards the east.

topPlaces.name: Link Road, Cuttack
topPlaces.description: Link Road is a road in Cuttack, Odisha, India. It runs east from Link road cross at one end to Badambadi circle at the other.

topPlaces.name: Mahanadi River Delta
topPlaces.description: Mahanadi River Delta in India is a basin of deposit that drains a large land mass of the Indian subcontinent into the Bay of Bengal. The alluvial valley is wide and relatively flat with a meandering river channel that changes its course.

topPlaces.name: Mahanadi Vihar
topPlaces.description: Mahanadi Vihar is a residential area in Cuttack, Odisha, India. It is situated in a tongue of land formed by the Mahanadi River and National Highway 16.

topPlaces.name: Ravenshaw Radio
topPlaces.description: Ravenshaw Radio is the community radio station (CRS) of Ravenshaw University, Cuttack, Odisha, India. It is the first campus community radio station in Odisha, and was launched on 14 April 2011, the Oriya New Year.

topPlaces.name: Kadampara
topPlaces.description: Kadampada is a village situated on a river island in the Cuttack district, in the state of Odisha, India. The island is called 42 Mouza, meaning Group of 42 Villages.

topPlaces.name: Board of Secondary Education, Odisha
topPlaces.description: The Board of Secondary Education, Odisha (abbreviated B.S.E) is a board of education for government, public and private schools under the state government of Odisha, India.

topPlaces.name: Belagachhia
topPlaces.description: Belagachhia is a census town in Cuttack district in the state of Odisha, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lakhesvara Siva temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lakhesvara Siva temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lakhesvara Siva temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (24 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (21 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lakhesvara Siva temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lakhesvara Siva temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lakhesvara Siva temple?
faq.a: Stays in Lakhesvara Siva temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lakhesvara Siva temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Link Road, Cuttack, Mahanadi River Delta, Mahanadi Vihar, Ravenshaw Radio, Kadampara.
